rawContent: {"stage":"review","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Build stage reported successful edit but git diff shows zero changes — always verify actual committed diff, not just stage logs.","scope":"git"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Comment text mismatch: task.md specifies `<!-- kody observability smoke 0.4.0 2026-04-17 -->` but acceptance says `<!-- observability-smoke-0.4.0 -->` — clarify exact string before editing.","scope":"task.md"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"A failed edit silently succeeds if the file content already matches the intended change — verify with git diff to confirm actual modification.","scope":"edit verification"}]}
